title: telesphoreo #5052
definition:
1) to bring to (perfection or) maturity
    1a) of fruits
    1b) of pregnant women
    1c) of animals bringing their young to maturity
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to bring to (perfection or) maturity
    1a) of fruits
    1b) of pregnant women
    1c) of animals bringing their young to maturity

    NASB:  to bring fruit to perfection, hence to bear perfect offspring:
